targets.rawSql:
WITH module_pool AS (
	SELECT mod_ivtest_no, module_name, date_test, comment, rel_hum::float, temp_c::float FROM public.module_iv_test
	WHERE module_name LIKE '320%' AND status = 8
),
base_modules AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT module_name
    FROM module_pool
),

thermal1 AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (module_name)
        module_name,
        mod_ivtest_no,
        date_test
    FROM module_pool
    WHERE (
        (rel_hum > 12 AND temp_c > 0)
        OR comment = 'thermal1'
    )
    ORDER BY module_name, mod_ivtest_no DESC
),

thermal2 AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (module_name)
        module_name,
        mod_ivtest_no,
        date_test
    FROM module_pool
	WHERE comment = 'thermal2' OR
    ( temp_c < -20)
    ORDER BY module_name, mod_ivtest_no DESC
),

thermal3 AS (
    SELECT DISTINCT ON (module_name)
        module_name,
        mod_ivtest_no,
        date_test
    FROM module_pool
	WHERE comment = 'thermal3' OR
    (rel_hum < 12 AND temp_c > 0)
    ORDER BY module_name, mod_ivtest_no DESC
),
my_module_info AS (
SELECT
 module_name, 
 TO_CHAR(assembled::DATE, 'YY-MM-dd')       AS assembled,
 TO_CHAR(inspected::DATE, 'YY-MM-dd')       AS inspected,
 TO_CHAR(wb_back::DATE, 'YY-MM-dd')         AS back_wirebond,
 TO_CHAR(encap_back::DATE, 'YY-MM-dd')      AS back_encapsulate,
 TO_CHAR(wb_front::DATE, 'YY-MM-dd')        AS front_wirebond,
 TO_CHAR(encap_front::DATE, 'YY-MM-dd')     AS front_encapsulate,
 TO_CHAR(test_ped::DATE, 'YY-MM-dd')        AS pedestal_test,
 TO_CHAR(test_iv::DATE, 'YY-MM-dd')         AS iv_curve,
 ROW_NUMBER() OVER (
    PARTITION BY module_name
    ORDER BY module_no DESC
 ) AS rn
 FROM public.module_info
  WHERE module_name LIKE '320%'
)

SELECT
 t.module_name,
  t.assembled,
  t.inspected AS module_inspect,
  t.back_wirebond,
  t.back_encapsulate,
  t.front_wirebond,
  t.front_encapsulate,
  t.pedestal_test,
  t.iv_curve,
  TO_CHAR(t1.date_test::DATE, 'YY-MM-dd') AS IV_thermal_init,
  TO_CHAR(t2.date_test::DATE, 'YY-MM-dd') AS IV_thermal_low_temp,
  TO_CHAR(t3.date_test::DATE, 'YY-MM-dd') AS IV_thermal_finished
  
FROM my_module_info AS t
LEFT JOIN thermal1 t1 ON t.module_name = t1.module_name
LEFT JOIN thermal2 t2 ON t.module_name = t2.module_name
LEFT JOIN thermal3 t3 ON t.module_name = t3.module_name
ORDER BY RIGHT(t.module_name,4) DESC;
